creator: 2khramtsov@gmail.com
text:
ffmpeg -i in.mp4 -c:v libsvtav1 -preset 4 -qp 61 -c:a libopus -b:a 16k out.mkv

The above will result in usem process state hang with sufficiently long videos. Backporting af222120c fixes this.

See https://gitlab.com/AOMediaCodec/SVT-AV1/-/commit/af222120c8cf605722f5143a224ee883f6e674fd and https://www.reddit.com/r/AV1/comments/t74avy/comment/hzfgfw8/?context=3
